chapter_title: Logical Alphabet and Number Sequence Test

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is exactly in the middle between D and U in the given arrangement?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following, three are alike in a certain way based on their position in the given arrangement and so form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How many such symbols are there in the given arrangement each of which is immediately preceded by a number but not immediately followed by a consonant?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which number has come maximum time in the following number series?
5 4 3 3 5 4 8 8 3 2 5 3 6 5 5

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which number comes least in the given series?
8 4 6 7 3 4 3 7 8 3 4 4 5 6 3 4 6 4 3 4 8 [SSC (CGL) 2008]

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
How many 4's are there in the series which comes between two 5's?
3 4 4 5 4 5 4 2 1 4 5 4 5 7 4 5 4 5 [CBI (PO) 2011]

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
How many 7's are there in the given series which are immediately preceded by 6 but not immediately followed by 8?
3 4 8 7 6 1 5 6 7 8 4 9 6 7 5 [SSC (CPO) 2008]

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which digit comes in the middle of the given series?
2 4 3 5 4 4 5 6 7 8 8 9 5 6 7 1 7

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
In the given number series, how many 4's are there which are immediately preceded by a prime number but not immediately followed by a prime number? [RBI Grade 'B' 2011]
41 41 54 26 41 83 49 24 83 48 28 45 48 74 64 54

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
How many letters are immediately followed by L in the given letter series? [UP B.Ed. 2011]
C P M L M M B L T L D E S L

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
How many times n comes before p in the given series? [RRB (ALP) 2010]
m s t n p z x n p n p q y n p r a n p s t

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
In the following series, how many Ks are there which are immediately preceded by N and immediately followed by U? [SSC (CGL) 2011]
A B C D K N L J M N K S T R Z N K U A N K U B W X N K L S

solutions.solution:
Let us see
D = 12th from the left
U = 26th from the left
∴ Middle letter between D and U = (12 + 26)/2 = 19th from left = 9
As in all others the first and the third elements are consecutive ones in the given arrangement.

Let us see
B 5 R 1 @ E K 4 F 7 © D A M 2 P 3 $ 9 H I W 8 % 6 U J $ V Q #
✓ = Condition fulfilled    × = Condition not fulfilled
Clearly, there are three such symbols.
